tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Laboratory results are generally within normal limits, indicating good glycemic, renal, and lipid control. Notable findings include mildly elevated chloride and low HDL cholesterol, which may increase cardiovascular risk. Continued monitoring and lifestyle optimization are recommended, especially regarding lipid profile. No acute abnormalities detected.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
